title: Eremosis leiocarpa

Eremosis leiocarpa is a member of the tribe Senecioneae, which is a group of plants commonly known as ragworts. The plant is also sometimes classified within the subfamily Cichorioideae, which is a subfamily of flowering plants within the Asteraceae family.
